summary: Code review findings addressed: 7 items (I-1 through S-4). spawnBackgroundCheck now self-contained with internal try/catch (I-1). CLI hooks cache config interval to avoid double reads (I-2). MCP path validates updateCheckInterval with Number.isInteger and >= 0 (I-3). Pre-existing SDK type cast left as-is (S-1). Dynamic import kept for consistency (S-2). Pre-release NaN behavior documented with test (S-3). Unicode arrow replaced with ASCII (S-4). All tests pass: 40 core, 15 CLI, 13 MCP. All typechecks pass.
learnings: Pre-release version like 1.8.0-beta.1 only suppresses notification when NaN is on the differentiating semver part (e.g., patch). Higher major/minor still triggers notification.
NaN and Infinity become null in JSON.stringify, so config file tests cannot test those values directly — use negative numbers and floats instead.
The as unknown as Promise<never> cast in server.ts is a pre-existing SDK typing workaround, not introduced by the update-check feature.
